heading: Foreclosure action against United States
label: 1444 Foreclosure action against United States
text: Any action brought under against the United States in any State court may be removed by the United States to the district court of the United States for the district and division in which the action is pending.section 2410 of this title
notes: 1948ActBased on title 28, U.S.C., 1940 ed., § 903 (, ).Mar. 4, 1931, ch. 515, § 346 Stat. 1529The procedural provisions of , U.S.C., 1940 ed., were omitted as covered by .section 903 of title 28section 1446 of this titleChanges were made in phraseology.
1949ActThis section corrects typographical errors in , U.S.C.section 1444 of title 28
Amendments1949—Act , inserted “court” between “State” and “may”, and substituted “division” for “divisions”.May 24, 1949
